nodes.label: AI as supplementary tool for data processing and literature identification
nodes.label_negative: AI as primary or sole research executor

nodes.label: AI reliability and consistency in literature synopsis
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability and inconsistency in literature synopsis

nodes.label: Research ownership and personal intellectual contribution
nodes.grounding_span: I would like my research to be my own - my own ideas, analyses, and conclusions

nodes.label: AI as first step requiring human verification
nodes.grounding_span: I consider AI to be the first step of many, I always go in and run any calculations and read any materials thoroughly myself

nodes.label: Research integrity and ethical scientific practice
nodes.grounding_span: it's integral to the scientific process to follow certain steps and ensure that my research is all of my own work

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and reliable knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: the synopses that it provides are often missing key details and misquoting information

nodes.label: Cautious instrumentalism toward AI as supplement
nodes.grounding_span: I decided to utilize AI to supplement the traditional approaches

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's poor literature synopsis
nodes.grounding_span: it does a very poor job of it

nodes.label: Aspirational desire for reliable AI literature analysis
nodes.grounding_span: If AI could consistently identify papers that would be relevant to my research and take the most important parts, creating an accurate synopsis

nodes.label: Systematic verification and iterative refinement
